news.title:
Info Edge executed NSE block trade of ~515,697 shares at Rs. 999.2.
Trade value totaled Rs. 51.53 crores, highlighting significant transaction volume.
news.summary:
Info Edge executed NSE block trade of ~515,697 shares at Rs. 999.2.
Trade value totaled Rs. 51.53 crores, highlighting significant transaction volume.

news.title:
Info Edge commits ₹250 crore to invest in next-gen tech startups in India.
Q3 results show 14% profit drop sequentially, but revenue and margins improve.
news.summary:
Info Edge commits ₹250 crore to invest in next-gen tech startups in India.
Q3 results show 14% profit drop sequentially, but revenue and margins improve.

news.title:
Info Edge's board approves Rs. 250 crore investment in B8 Fund I via Smartweb.
B8 Fund I aims to support Indian tech startups; investment aligns with long-term growth goals.
news.summary:
Info Edge's board approves Rs. 250 crore investment in B8 Fund I via Smartweb.
B8 Fund I aims to support Indian tech startups; investment aligns with long-term growth goals.

news.title: Jefferies downgraded Info Edge from Buy to Hold, cutting target price to Rs 1290 from Rs 1880.
news.summary: Jefferies downgraded Info Edge from Buy to Hold, cutting target price to Rs 1290 from Rs 1880.

news.title:
Info Edge sold a 50.94% stake in Agstack Technologies to Akshamaala Solutions for ₹91.7 crore.
SIHL will invest ₹35 crore in Unnati, acquiring a 20.53% ownership stake.
news.summary:
Info Edge sold a 50.94% stake in Agstack Technologies to Akshamaala Solutions for ₹91.7 crore.
SIHL will invest ₹35 crore in Unnati, acquiring a 20.53% ownership stake.

news.title:
Info Edge's subsidiary SIHL transferred its 50.94% stake in Gramophone to Unnati for INR 91.7 Cr, receiving 49,145 preference shares.
SIHL also invested INR 35 Cr in Unnati, raising its shareholding to 20.5%, making Unnati its Associate Company post-merger.
news.summary:
Info Edge's subsidiary SIHL transferred its 50.94% stake in Gramophone to Unnati for INR 91.7 Cr, receiving 49,145 preference shares.
SIHL also invested INR 35 Cr in Unnati, raising its shareholding to 20.5%, making Unnati its Associate Company post-merger.

news.title:
Info Edge approved a ₹30 crore investment in subsidiary SIHL via 14,01,214 CCDs.
The funds will aid SIHL in investments, including AIFs; shares fell 0.1% to ₹1,124.10.
news.summary:
Info Edge approved a ₹30 crore investment in subsidiary SIHL via 14,01,214 CCDs.
The funds will aid SIHL in investments, including AIFs; shares fell 0.1% to ₹1,124.10.

news.title: Info Edge (India) approves ₹30 crore investment in subsidiary Startup Investments.
news.summary: Info Edge (India) approves ₹30 crore investment in subsidiary Startup Investments.

news.title:
Info Edge faces investor concerns over AI's impact on recruitment, with shares down 15% mirroring Nifty IT's decline.
Q3FY26 saw 14% revenue growth and strong Naukri.com performance, but IT hiring uncertainty and modest non-IT growth pose challenges.
news.summary:
Info Edge faces investor concerns over AI's impact on recruitment, with shares down 15% mirroring Nifty IT's decline.
Q3FY26 saw 14% revenue growth and strong Naukri.com performance, but IT hiring uncertainty and modest non-IT growth pose challenges.

news.title: Citi maintains a bearish outlook on Info Edge, cutting target price to 1,120.
news.summary: Citi maintains a bearish outlook on Info Edge, cutting target price to 1,120.

news.title: Info Edge declares a dividend of ₹2.4/share, showcasing value return to shareholders.
news.summary: Info Edge declares a dividend of ₹2.4/share, showcasing value return to shareholders.

news.title: Info Edge reported Q3 revenue of 8.2B rupees, up from 8B QoQ.
news.summary: Info Edge reported Q3 revenue of 8.2B rupees, up from 8B QoQ.

news.title:
Info Edge (India) Ltd will host a conference call on Feb 13, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
The call discusses financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Info Edge (India) Ltd will host a conference call on Feb 13, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
The call discusses financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Tata Motors CV, HDFC AMC, Muthoot Finance, and others are potential inclusions in Nifty Next 50 during March rejig, replacing stocks like Info Edge and JSW Energy.
Tata Motors CV inclusion could see $143M inflows; exclusions like Bajaj Housing may lead to $14M-$80M outflows per Nuvama Alternative.
news.summary:
Tata Motors CV, HDFC AMC, Muthoot Finance, and others are potential inclusions in Nifty Next 50 during March rejig, replacing stocks like Info Edge and JSW Energy.
Tata Motors CV inclusion could see $143M inflows; exclusions like Bajaj Housing may lead to $14M-$80M outflows per Nuvama Alternative.

news.title:
Info Edge invested ₹66 Cr out of the approved ₹100 Cr in Redstart Labs.
The remaining ₹34 Cr will be disbursed incrementally over six months.
news.summary:
Info Edge invested ₹66 Cr out of the approved ₹100 Cr in Redstart Labs.
The remaining ₹34 Cr will be disbursed incrementally over six months.

news.title:
Info Edge accidentally shared unaudited draft financial results for Dec 2025 with an outsider.
The draft results were intended for the firm's statutory auditors.
news.summary:
Info Edge accidentally shared unaudited draft financial results for Dec 2025 with an outsider.
The draft results were intended for the firm's statutory auditors.

news.title:
Info Edge addressed a whistle-blower complaint in its 99acres vertical, investigated by experts.
Findings showed no material financial impact; remedial actions are being implemented.
news.summary:
Info Edge addressed a whistle-blower complaint in its 99acres vertical, investigated by experts.
Findings showed no material financial impact; remedial actions are being implemented.

news.title:
Info Edge's subsidiary Jeevansathi to invest Rs. 10 Cr in Aisle Network.
Aisle, a dating platform operator, remains a wholly owned subsidiary post-investment.
news.summary:
Info Edge's subsidiary Jeevansathi to invest Rs. 10 Cr in Aisle Network.
Aisle, a dating platform operator, remains a wholly owned subsidiary post-investment.

news.title:
Info Edge reports Q3 FY26 standalone billings of ₹747.2 Cr, up from ₹668.3 Cr in Q3 FY25.
Nine-month billings rose to ₹2120.4 Cr compared to ₹1897.9 Cr in FY25.
news.summary:
Info Edge reports Q3 FY26 standalone billings of ₹747.2 Cr, up from ₹668.3 Cr in Q3 FY25.
Nine-month billings rose to ₹2120.4 Cr compared to ₹1897.9 Cr in FY25.

news.title:
Info Edge executed a block trade worth Rs. 34.52 Cr on NSE.
Around 252,347 shares were traded at Rs. 1368.1 per share.
news.summary:
Info Edge executed a block trade worth Rs. 34.52 Cr on NSE.
